title: Silky Herb Bread
description: A herbal and indulgent Brazilian dish featuring bread flour, with a touch of sweetness to make it diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a loaf pan with cooking spray or oil.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the bread flour, unsweetened cocoa powder, ground flaxseed, maple syrup or honey, vanilla extract, and sea salt. Stir well to mix in all ingredients.
Add in the baking powder and stir until fully incorporated. The mixture will be quite wet; this is intentional for a silky texture.
Pour the mixture into prepared loaf pan. Smooth the top with a spatula.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Let cool in the pan for at least 10 minutes before removing to serve.
Optional: For an extra indulgent touch, you can drizzle a bit of melted chocolate on top before serving.
